properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 136/18
NORWEGIAN SEA
1. TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER ON ANDOEYA. IN THE PERIOD FROM 04 TO 19 DEC  2018. THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0700 TO 1200 UTC, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS.
AREA 1: 
A. 69-17.6N 016-01.0E.
B. 69-24.0N 015-51.0E.
C. 69-50.0N-015 46.0E.
D. 69-50.0N 016-10.0E.
E. 69-24.0N-016-10.0E.
AREA 2:
CIRCLE WITH CENTER IN POSITION 74-10.0N.  015-50.0E. WITH A RADIUS OF 30 NM
